title: Fact or Fiction? The Norfolk Sea Creature
original_title: Fact or Fiction? The Norfolk Sea Creature
overview: For years strange sightings of an unidentified creature have been reported on the East Norfolk coastline. FACT OR FICTION? investigates these sightings and showcases the stories of those who have encountered it along the coast.
